_instructions.note: Add your team members here. Use Slack user IDs (format: U followed by letters/numbers).
_instructions.how_to_find_slack_id: Right-click on a member's name in Slack → View profile → More (three dots) → Copy member ID
_instructions.date_format: MM-DD for birthdays and anniversaries (year not needed for birthdays)
_instructions.anniversary_format: YYYY-MM-DD (full date when they joined the company)

achievements._note: Add team achievements here to celebrate them automatically
